## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="str-28vd.4"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## TASK: str-28vd.4 — Docs quality tool configs

**Priority**: P2  
**Labels**: ci, docs, tooling

**Description**: Add repository configuration for documentation quality tools: markdownlint-cli2, Vale, and lychee. Convert current script placeholders into executable doc checks.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- Repository config files for markdownlint-cli2, Vale, and lychee are committed
- scripts/quality/check-docs.sh uses them successfully when the tools are installed
- At least one existing docs issue or drift case is covered by the configured checks

**Approach**:
1. Read current scripts/quality/check-docs.sh
2. Create .markdownlint-cli2.yaml config
3. Create .vale.ini and Vale styles directory
4. Create lychee.toml config
5. Update check-docs.sh to run these tools with graceful fallback
6. Test the configuration catches at least one real issue

Follow all conventions in CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md. Before reporting done, run `/pre-completion` and include the output.

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773237319266-jf9ddhl","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"REPO_ROOT=\"$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\" && BRANCH_NAME=\"str-28vd.4\" && WORKTREE_DIR=\"$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME\" && if [ -d \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" ]; then echo \"Worktree already exists, reusing\"; else git worktree add \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" -b \"$BRANCH_NAME\"; fi && cd \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" && echo \"CWD: $(pwd)\" && echo \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current)\" && echo \"$(pwd)\" | grep -q '\\.claude/worktrees/' && echo \"WORKTREE VERIFIED\" || echo \"FATAL: NOT in a worktree\"","description":"Create and verify worktree"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773237649463-3sairqx","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"file_path":"/home/ketan/project/shatter/.claude/worktrees/str-28vd.4/.markdownlint-cli2.yaml","content":"# markdownlint-cli2 configuration for Shatter documentation.
# Rules reference: https://github.com/DavidAnson/markdownlint/blob/main/doc/Rules.md

globs:
  - "**/*.md"
  - "!node_modules"
  - "!target"
  - "!.claude"
  - "!shatter-ts/node_modules"

config:
  # Disable line length — tables and code blocks routinely exceed 80 chars
  MD013: false

  # Disable inline HTML — not used, but avoid false positives from angle brackets
  MD033: false

  # Disable first-line-h1 — sub-crate CLAUDE.md files use # crate-name
  MD041: false

  # Allow duplicate headings in different sections (common in multi-section docs)
  MD024:
    siblings_only: true

  # Allow trailing punctuation in headings (used in this project for ? and :)
  MD026:
    punctuation: ".,;!"
"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773237676863-7e4q5yy","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"file_path":"/home/ketan/project/shatter/.claude/worktrees/str-28vd.4/.vale.ini","content":"# Vale prose linter configuration for Shatter documentation.
# Docs: https://vale.sh/docs/topics/config

StylesPath = styles
MinAlertLevel = suggestion

Vocab = Shatter

# Only lint Markdown files
[*.md]
BasedOnStyles = Vale
"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773260064625-hbh2soq","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"file_path":"/home/ketan/project/shatter/.claude/worktrees/str-28vd.4/lychee.toml","content":"# Lychee link checker configuration for Shatter documentation.
# Docs: https://lychee.cli.rs/usage/config

# Exclude localhost and loopback URLs (used in examples, not real endpoints)
exclude = [
  "^https?://localhost",
  "^https?://127\\.0\\.0\\.1",
  "^https?://\\[::1\\]",
]

# Directories to skip
exclude_path = [
  "node_modules",
  "target",
  ".claude",
  "shatter-ts/node_modules",
]

# Network settings
timeout = 30
max_retries = 2
accept = [200, 204]

# Don't check email addresses (mailto: links)
include_mail = false

# Don't require HTTPS (some links in docs may be HTTP)
require_https = false
"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773261213161-6iyk1m1","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"file_path":"/home/ketan/project/shatter/.claude/worktrees/str-28vd.4/.markdownlint-cli2.yaml","content":"# markdownlint-cli2 configuration for Shatter documentation.
# Rules reference: https://github.com/DavidAnson/markdownlint/blob/main/doc/Rules.md

config:
  # Disable line length — tables and code blocks routinely exceed 80 chars
  MD013: false

  # Disable inline HTML — not used, but avoid false positives from angle brackets
  MD033: false

  # Disable first-line-h1 — sub-crate CLAUDE.md files use # crate-name
  MD041: false

  # Allow duplicate headings in different sections (common in multi-section docs)
  MD024:
    siblings_only: true

  # Allow trailing punctuation in headings (used in this project for ? and :)
  MD026:
    punctuation: ".,;!"

  # Disable blanks-around-lists — project style embeds lists in numbered steps
  MD032: false

  # Disable blanks-around-fences — project style uses fences inside list items
  MD031: false

  # Disable fenced-code-language — some fences intentionally omit language
  MD040: false

  # Disable table column style — project uses compact pipe style
  MD060: false

ignores:
  - "node_modules/**"
  - "target/**"
  - ".claude/**"
  - "shatter-ts/node_modules/**"
  - ".beads/**"
"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773263173753-3oa7bdk","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"git add .markdownlint-cli2.yaml .vale.ini lychee.toml styles/Vocab/Shatter/accept.txt scripts/quality/check-docs.sh && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
str-28vd.4: Add docs quality tool configs

Add repository configuration for markdownlint-cli2, Vale, and lychee so
check-docs.sh uses project-specific rules when the tools are installed.

- .markdownlint-cli2.yaml: disables noisy rules (line length, inline HTML,
  blanks-around-lists/fences, table column style) while keeping valuable
  checks (heading blanks, ordered list prefix, emphasis consistency)
- .vale.ini + styles/Vocab/Shatter/accept.txt: Vale prose linter with
  project-specific vocabulary (concolic, proptest, Z3, SymExpr, etc.)
- lychee.toml: link checker excluding localhost URLs and build artifacts
- check-docs.sh: expanded DOC_TARGETS to include PLAN.md, SPEC.md,
  PROTOCOL.md, PARITY.md; passes explicit --config flags to tools

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit docs quality tool configs"},"permission_updates":[]}}
